headline: Fishbone Advisors Survey: Institutional Investors See Healthcare's AI Story as Overblown
summary: CHICAGO, July 22, 2026--Fishbone Advisors, a capital markets intelligence firm, today released a new report showing that healthcare's AI narrative has a credibility problem with institutional investors. In every healthcare subsector, roughly half to two-thirds of investors (48% to 67%) agree that management overemphasizes AI relative to its actual financial contribution, the most consistent finding in "Hallucinating Value: Healthcare's AI Narrative."
